title: Legi AntiXray
description: Reliable anti-xray protection for your SMP. Prevent cheaters from finding your valuables. Easy to configure, highly effective.
body:
# 🛡️Legi Anti Xray 

**Legi AntiXray** is a reliable anti-xray protection plugin designed for your SMP. It prevents cheaters from using X-Ray hacks to find valuable resources like diamonds, netherite, and other precious blocks.

## ✨ **Key Features:**
- Complete anti-xray protection
- Blocks X-Ray cheating effectively
- Easy configuration
- Minimal performance impact
- Optimized for Spigot/Paper servers

🛡️ Keep your SMP safe and secure!
